chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-6458 of 2020 Const. Petition No. D-3870 of 2021 Const. Petition No. D-3871 of 2021 Const. Petition No. D-3872 of 2021 Const. Petition No. D-3873 of 2021 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on Misc. No.31640/21 3. For hearing of Misc. No.1896/21 4. For hearing of Misc. No.27748/20 5. For hearing of main case. 29.05.2025. Ms. Wajiha M. Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General. ------------------------------ All these are old cases of 2020/2021 which are over 5/4 years ago. Diary sheets show that in the last 4/5 years learned counsel for the petitioners have failed to pursue these petitions diligently. None present for the petitioners without intimation despite this being day by court matters. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing these old petitions which are hereby dismissed on account of non-prosecution alongwith pending applications. Office to place copy of this order all connected matters. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
